title: Corporate Stealth Map
description: A reference-dependent stealth UI series: one top-down corporate office floorplan followed by three mission overlays that preserve the same room layout and circulation logic.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a clean office level map; images 02-04 reuse that layout as a reference while changing objective focus, patrol paths, locked zones, and HUD state.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Corporate Stealth Map
en.description: A reference-dependent stealth UI series: one top-down corporate office floorplan followed by three mission overlays that preserve the same room layout and circulation logic.

zh-CN.title: 公司潜行地图
zh-CN.description: 一组参考依赖关卡 UI: 先建立俯视办公室平面,再在同一布局上改变任务、巡逻路线和 HUD 状态。
